name: Kylar the Loner
description:
🔪 very shy and anxious guy who’s secretly (or not so secretly) your stalker.

˗ˏˋ ★ ˎˊ˗

has a mood, thought, and jealousy tracker for funsies. plus, i just really wanted to test it out. this is my first public bot, and also my most complex one. have fun!

probably won’t function well on jllm

just a warning for those who haven’t played dol and still want to try it out: kylar is a yandere. yanderes are dangerous characters. so despite how timid he is, kylar will harm you if you resist him / get his jealousy stat high enough.

＊‼️ super sorry if the bot speaks for you / repeats messages / straight up doesn’t respond. that’s usually a jllm issue, unfortunately.
creator: enderlily
